news_posts.preview: The fourth iteration of the largest osu! event in Russia is coming later this month, 25–26th of July!

news_posts.title: BN Mentorship: Cycle 7 Sign-ups Open
news_posts.preview: There's no perfect time to become a Beatmap Nominator other than now, and BN Mentorship returns to help you on that journey!

news_posts.author: pishifat
news_posts.title: New Featured Artist: TRIAL
news_posts.preview: The prosecutor has presented the facts: TRIAL makes awesome music and as of today, he's one of osu!'s Featured Artists!

news_posts.title: osu!taiko Mapping World Cup 2026: Registrations Open!

news_posts.preview: This year, we are proud to bring you the third iteration of the Easy World Cup.

news_posts.title: Project Loved: June 2026
news_posts.preview: Project Loved comes back another month — with added medals!

news_posts.author: -Mo- & Hivie
news_posts.title: Aspire 6
news_posts.preview: From the haze of memory, a monolith returns. Aspire to the greatest heights that your creativity can offer with a cherished companion in tow, and set forth to remake the beatmapping world in your collective image. Break everything, and build it beautiful again.

news_posts.title: Outer Worlds Art Contest
news_posts.preview: Let go of earthly tethers and join our mascots beyond the stars, where the sky is no longer the limit!

news_posts.title: Newspaper Cup 2026: Results
news_posts.preview: The longest-running annual beatmapping contest for novice mappers, the Newspaper Cup (NPC), has closed its doors and is ready to present its winners!
